title: Consul Connect Intention
description: An intention authorizes or denies traffic between two services in the Consul service mesh.

ID.description: Server-assigned UUID (deprecated in v1.9+ in favor of source/destination addressing).

SourceName.description: Source service name. Use '*' for any source.

Action.description: Whether the intention permits or denies the connection.

Precedence.description: Server-computed precedence used to evaluate overlapping intentions.
